nasb.text: For he has come out of prison to become king, even though he was born poor in his kingdom.

esv.text: For he went from prison to the throne, though in his own kingdom he had been born poor.

cnv.text: 雖然他是從監獄出來，在自己的國中，又是出身貧寒，卻起來作王。

ccb.text: 虽然这青年在本国出身贫寒，却能从囚犯成为君王。

csbs.text: 虽然这年轻人在自己的国中出身贫寒，他从监牢中出来却作了王。
